scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @party-pool/server & npm run dev -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @party-pool/shared && npm run test -w @party-pool/server && npm run test -w web
scripts.test:watch: npm run test:watch -w @party-pool/shared & npm run test:watch -w @party-pool/server
scripts.build: npm run build -w @party-pool/shared && npm run build -w @party-pool/server && npm run build -w web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck -w @party-pool/shared && npm run typecheck -w @party-pool/server && npm run typecheck -w web
